productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Trainer White Sports Shoes
description: Synthetic mesh upper and tongue for maximum ventilation Three striped overlays on sides representing the brand's motto of perseverence and performance Lace-ups for snug Fit and durability Lightly padded tongue and collar for comfort adidas logo embossed on tongue and behind collar to create a fashion statement Lightly padded sockliner for in step comfort and snug fit EVA midsole for comfort and durability Lightly padded footbed for impact protection and comfort Made of non-marking durable rubber for enhanced durability Geometric lugs for added grip and traction Pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of forefoot without injuring the leg Vertical grooved box on inner arch for ergonomic comfort and support for medial foot Reinforced toe guard on the upper for forefoot protection
